targets.rawSql: SELECT billing_status, count() AS calls FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) GROUP BY billing_status ORDER BY calls DESC

SELECT missing_usage_components, count() AS calls FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) AND length(missing_usage_components) > 2 GROUP BY missing_usage_components ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Age Of Latest Replicated Billing Update
panels.description: Best-effort freshness based on the latest replicated updated_at timestamp. This is not an exact PeerDB mirror lag metric.

targets.rawSql: SELECT dateDiff('second', max(updated_at), now()) AS replicated_update_age_seconds FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current

SELECT $__timeInterval(created_at) AS time, component, countIf(is_late) AS late_usage_events FROM voicemesh.billing_usage_current WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time, component ORDER BY time

SELECT reason_code, component, count() AS adjustments, sum(customer_charge_delta_microunits) / 1000000 AS adjustment_amount FROM voicemesh.billing_adjustments_current WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY reason_code, component ORDER BY adjustments DESC

SELECT 'provider cost with zero customer charge' AS signal, countIf(provider_cost_total_microunits > 0 AND customer_charge_total_microunits = 0) AS calls FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) UNION ALL SELECT 'negative-margin calls', countIf(gross_margin_microunits < 0) FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) UNION ALL SELECT 'estimated usage unresolved', countIf(is_estimated) FROM voicemesh.billing_line_items_current WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT call_id, tenant_id, assistant_id, billing_status, missing_usage_components, provider_cost_total_microunits / 1000000 AS provider_cost, customer_charge_total_microunits / 1000000 AS customer_charge, gross_margin_microunits / 1000000 AS gross_margin, pricing_version, updated_at, trace_id FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (length(missing_usage_components) > 2 OR gross_margin_microunits < 0 OR billing_status != 'FINALIZED') ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 100
